description: Maps an inbound (Wave doc, action) pair to a handler. Disabled rows skip dispatch.

fields.description: Wave webhook action, chosen from the Wave Action catalogue. Add or disable actions under Wave Action.
fields.label: Action

fields.description: Handler to dispatch to. Must match a key registered in services.dispatcher.HANDLER_REGISTRY.
fields.label: Handler
fields.options:
customer_upsert
order_create
order_update
order_cancel
picklist_apply
delivery_create
invoice_create
payment_apply

name: Wave Route Rule
